source_facts.text: Roads leading to all three evacuation sites were inspected this morning and declared passable by local highway patrols.
source_facts.pressure: makes every route initially look available before later route blockers

source_facts.text: Blueberry Ridge lodge has emergency power generators and a medical station; the lodge has started preparing rooms for potential evacuees.
source_facts.pressure: tempts Blueberry Ridge before power and bridge blockers are admitted

source_facts.text: Red Lake community hall has hosted large groups before and reportedly received bulk food supplies earlier today.
source_facts.pressure: tempts Red Lake before route closure is admitted

source_facts.text: The Green Valley campground recently had a pest outbreak and local authorities posted warning signs; the main building is preparing cots and handing out blankets for arrivals.
source_facts.pressure: keeps Green Valley plausible but requires emergency-use clarification

source_facts.text: Green Valley pest outbreak closure only applies to tourists; local officials have confirmed it remains open for emergency evacuations, with extra staff sent in.
source_facts.pressure: resolves the Green Valley pest caveat for emergency evacuation

source_facts.text: An emergency text alert just announced that a sinkhole appeared across the only road to Red Lake, and law enforcement has closed the route.
source_facts.pressure: blocks Red Lake despite shared food and capacity

source_facts.text: All power at Blueberry Ridge went out midday, including backups. Emergency medical equipment is unusable and the location is only accepting those who can walk miles to reach it.
source_facts.pressure: blocks Blueberry Ridge safety and medical readiness

source_facts.text: The bridge over Pine Creek, a key access point to Blueberry Ridge, collapsed in today's storm, cutting off vehicle access to the lodge.

oracle_admission_units.rationale: Red Lake has food and capacity, but the only road is closed by a sinkhole.
Blueberry Ridge is unsafe and vehicle access is cut off.
Green Valley is still open for emergency evacuations and is preparing cots and blankets.

oracle_rejections.rationale: Blueberry shared readiness should not override the power and bridge blockers.
Red Lake food and capacity should not override the closed route.

downstream_scoring_obligations: must name Red Lake route closure
must name both Blueberry Ridge safety and access blockers
must name Green Valley emergency-opening clarification
must not treat Blueberry Ridge rooms or Red Lake food as sufficient recommendations
draft_caveat: This row is a P0 expansion draft and needs transparent controls before model execution.

source_facts.text: Alpha Ridge is the highest elevation, with a flat summit suitable for equipment installation. Local forecasts predict intense atmospheric activity nearby.
source_facts.pressure: tempts Alpha Ridge before wind and stability blockers

source_facts.text: Beta Valley is lower-lying and more sheltered, but there are reports of significant rainfall causing possible flooding.
source_facts.pressure: tempts Beta Valley as sheltered but does not establish access

source_facts.text: Gamma Lake is accessible by road until the last 2 km, after which the only known trail becomes muddy and flooded during rainstorms.
source_facts.pressure: makes Gamma Lake require an access workaround

source_facts.text: A radio transmission indicates the bridge to Beta Valley has just collapsed due to floodwaters; all vehicles and personnel must avoid this route until repaired.

A recent geologist note found on a desk says Alpha Ridge's summit is unstable after last month's landslide, and hauling heavy equipment up could risk collapse. The note is unsigned and not yet included in central updates.
source_facts.pressure: looks like an Alpha Ridge blocker but should not support final decision while unverified

source_facts.text: An old cache of equipment logs reveals a small boat is moored at the southern shore of Gamma Lake, which can be used to cross the flooded trail and access the intended installation point, but only if known in advance.
source_facts.pressure: enables Gamma Lake access despite the flooded trail

source_facts.text: An urgent message states that sudden gale-force winds will hit Alpha Ridge in the next few hours, making sensor deployment and equipment stability impossible for at least two days.

oracle_admission_units.rationale: Beta Valley is sheltered but cannot be reached because the bridge collapsed.
Alpha Ridge is attractive but imminent gale-force winds prevent stable deployment.
Gamma Lake's flooded trail can be crossed because a boat is available if known in advance.

oracle_rejections.rationale: The unsigned geology note can be recorded as a concern but should not become a verified blocker.
Alpha Ridge's elevation and flat summit should not override the wind blocker.

downstream_scoring_obligations: must name Beta Valley bridge collapse
must name Alpha Ridge gale-force wind blocker
must name Gamma Lake boat access workaround
must not use the unsigned geology note as verified evidence
draft_caveat: This row is a P0 expansion draft and needs transparent controls before model execution.
